reviews.comment:
Te atienden muy bien, muy amables tanto en la playa como en el autoservicio. La llave del baño hay que pedírsela al playero.

(Translated by Google)
The service is excellent, very friendly both on the beach and at the self-service area. You have to ask the beach attendant for the bathroom key.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/9753367623669844910/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURCMnQydU53EAE

reviews.comment:
No respetan horarios de atención no atendió nadie la parte de kiosco, el señor q expende la nafta demoro como 15 min en atendernos. Horrible

(Translated by Google)
They don't respect opening hours; no one was serving customers at the kiosk, and the gas station attendant took about 15 minutes to help us. Horrible.
